2985830.title: The midnight hour - growing threat
2985830.description: Welcome to the Midnight Hour, the show bringing you everything from blood and guts to boobs and butts to satisfy all your horror film needs. Tonight tensions rise to a boiling point as our leads slowly discover they're far from safe...
